problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
hypothesis: If Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus is applied to be, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
